case_title: ALVARO ROCHA BUENPIL VS. SIMON TON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-24-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ALVARO BUENPIL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIMON TON IS PRESENT. NO INTERPRETER AVAILABLE FOR HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUENPIL, ALVARO ROCHA AS TO DEFENDANT TON, SIMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BUENPIL, ALVARO ROCHA TON, SIMON
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUENPIL, ALVARO ROCHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED FEB-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TON, SIMON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-02-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ALVARO ROCHA BUENPIL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIMON TON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REQUIRE A SPANISH INTERPRETER AND DID NOT SCHEDULE ONE BEFORE THE HEARING. INTERPRETER'S OFFICE WAS NOT ABLE TO PROVIDE ONE WHEN CONTACTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUENPIL, ALVARO ROCHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TON, SIMON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
